---
title: "Differential Equations"
author: Apurva Nakade
date: 2026-07-13
listing:
  contents: "/*/index.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  categories: true
---

<!--
Copyright (c) 2026 Apurva Nakade. All rights reserved.
Released under Apache 2.0 license as described in the file LICENSE.
Authors: Apurva Nakade
-->

Numerical methods for ordinary differential equations approximate the solution of an initial value problem $y' = f(t, y)$, $y(t_0) = y_0$ by stepping forward in time, using only information already known at or before each step.
